agentExists.title: Agent Already Exists

auth.reasonChat: Chat requires sign in before the agent can start.
auth.reasonCommand: Running commands requires an OpenBrain account so the runtime can use your workspace identity.
auth.reasonPlan: Plan execution requires sign in before the agent can run.
auth.reasonThreadControl: Controlling a running thread requires sign in first.
auth.reasonCompact: Compacting a thread requires sign in first.
auth.reasonResume: Continuing this thread requires sign in first.
auth.orgHelp: Enter the code shown on your OpenBrain organization page. Leave empty to use your current/default organization.
auth.gatewayHelp: Enter the root URL of your private OpenBrain deployment, not a /gateway path.
auth.deviceInstruction: Enter this code in your browser to sign in:

billing.creditsDesc: Your plan can use AI chat, but the selected model requires credits. Open Models to choose or configure another provider model, or go to Billing to get credits.
billing.quotaDesc: Your available AI quota is exhausted for the current billing period. Open Billing to top up, change plan, or wait for quota to refresh, then retry.
billing.chatUnavailableDesc: Your account does not currently have chat access.

remote.passwordKeep: Password (leave blank to keep saved password)
remote.passphraseKeep: Passphrase (leave blank to keep saved passphrase)
